auth.title: Sign in
auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again to continue.
auth.footer: Members use the mobile app. This portal is for partner gyms only.
auth.consentPrefix: By signing in you agree to our

join.title: Join the GymPass network
join.subtitle: Tell us about your gym. After we approve your application you'll be able to log into the partner portal at this URL with the phone + password you choose below.
join.ownerPhoneHint: Jordanian mobile (+962 7X XXX XXXX). This will also be your login.
join.passwordHint: At least 8 characters. You'll use this to log in after approval.
join.latLngHint: Find your gym on Google Maps, right-click the pin, the first numbers are lat/lng.
join.thankYouBody: Thanks for applying. Our team will review your gym details and get back to you within 48 hours. If approved, you'll be able to log in with the phone + password you chose.

dashboard.title: Training Floor
dashboard.subtitle: Live overview of your gym.
dashboard.occupancyAria: Today's check-ins as a share of the busiest day in the last month.
dashboard.noCheckinsYet: No reps logged yet — your floor's quiet.

profile.title: Gym Profile
profile.subtitle: Edit your gym's public details.
profile.sectionHoursHint: Drives the live 'Open / Closed' dot in the sidebar and the hours block on the member-app gym profile.

hours.alwaysOpenHint: Members will see this gym as open at every hour, every day.
hours.everyDayHint: Applies to every day of the week.

profile.areaHint: Neighbourhood or district. Drives the area filter on the member app.
profile.phoneHint: Optional. Format: +962 7X XXX XXXX. Members can tap to call.
profile.categoryHint: How members find your gym in the explore tab.
profile.audienceHint: Who can check in. Members of the wrong gender are blocked at the QR scan.
profile.logoSubtitle: The brand mark members see in the GymPass app and on the partner portal sidebar.
profile.logoHint: Square works best. JPEG, PNG, or WebP up to {limit}MB.
profile.logoErrorUnsupportedType: Unsupported file type. Use JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
profile.logoErrorTooLarge: File is too large — keep it under {limit}MB.
profile.logoErrorUploadGeneric: Logo upload failed. Please try again.
profile.logoErrorDeleteGeneric: Couldn't remove the logo. Please try again.
profile.logoCropSubtitle: Position the brand mark inside the square. Choose how it should fill the circle and which edge to keep visible if it gets cropped.
profile.logoCropFillHint: Drag the image to position it. Use the slider or scroll to zoom in for a tighter crop.
profile.logoCropContainHint: The whole image is shown — useful for transparent marks. No crop is applied.

amenities.label: What's included
amenities.subtitle: Tick everything members can use at your gym. Anything not in the list, add it under "Other".
amenities.customHint: Press Enter to add. Lowercase, no commas. Each entry up to 48 characters.

photos.title: Gym photos
photos.subtitle: Upload interior, equipment, and ambience photos.
photos.uploadHint: JPEG, PNG, or WebP up to {limit}MB.
photos.noPhotosHint: Upload up to {limit}MB JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
photos.errorUnsupportedType: Unsupported file type. Use JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
photos.errorTooLarge: File is too large — keep it under {limit}MB.
photos.cropSubtitle: Drag the image to position it inside the frame and use the slider to zoom. This is exactly what members will see in the gym hero.

checkins.title: Member check-ins
checkins.subtitle: Every QR scan at your gym.

error.title: We couldn't load this page.
error.body: There was a problem talking to the GymPass server. This is usually a transient hiccup — try again, and if it keeps happening reach out to support.

sections.headline: Acceptance
sections.body:
By accessing the GymPass partner portal you accept these Partner Terms on behalf of your gym. If you are accepting on behalf of a legal entity you confirm you are authorised to bind that entity. If you do not accept, do not use the portal.

These terms apply only to the partner relationship. End-member terms are separate and presented inside the member app.

sections.headline: Partner account
sections.body:
Each partner account is provisioned by GymPass for a single gym location. Login credentials must be kept confidential and may not be shared with people outside the gym's authorised staff.

You are responsible for everything that happens under your account. Notify GymPass immediately if you suspect a credential has been compromised — sessions can be revoked from the device list.

sections.headline: Membership tiers and access
sections.body:
GymPass operates four tiers: Silver, Gold, Platinum and Diamond. The category your gym is filed under (gym, crossfit, martial arts, yoga) and your tier determine which members may check in.

A member presenting a valid QR scan within your gym's hours must be admitted. GymPass calculates and credits the visit; you do not collect payment from the member directly.

sections.headline: Check-in verification
sections.body:
Check-ins are verified server-side. Each scan is validated against the member's active subscription, tier window, daily quota, geographic proximity to the gym and the static QR identifier. The portal surfaces only the verified result — you do not need to validate manually.

Manipulating the QR identifier, accepting members outside their tier, or recording check-ins without a member being physically present is a material breach and grounds for immediate termination.

sections.headline: Payouts
sections.body:
Each verified check-in writes a line to the payout ledger at the rate agreed in your partner deal. Ledger entries are aggregated monthly into a payout statement viewable in the Payouts tab.

Payouts are issued to the bank account provided during onboarding. Disputes about a specific entry must be raised within thirty days of the statement closing; after that the statement is considered final.

sections.headline: Photos and identity
sections.body:
Photos, logo and gym description you upload through the portal will appear inside the member app's explore and gym-profile screens. You confirm you own (or have a licence to use) the content you upload.

GymPass may resize, recompress and crop uploaded media for presentation. Removing a photo from the portal removes it from the member app within minutes.

sections.headline: Hours, holidays and closures
sections.body:
Your published opening hours determine the check-in window members see. If you close for holiday or maintenance, update your hours in advance — members who attempt to check in outside published hours will be blocked and may complain to support.

Unplanned closures of more than 24 hours should be communicated to GymPass so we can place a temporary banner in the gym's profile.

sections.headline: Suspension and termination
sections.body:
GymPass may suspend partner access if we observe repeated check-in fraud, repeated member complaints about facility safety, regulatory issues, or unpaid amounts owed to GymPass. Suspension halts new check-ins while we investigate; the gym's profile is hidden in the member app.

Either party may terminate the partner agreement on 30 days written notice. On termination, pending payouts are settled at the next regular cycle.

sections.headline: Liability
sections.body:
GymPass provides the booking and payouts infrastructure. The gym remains the operator of its facility and is responsible for the safety, hygiene and lawful operation of that facility.

To the maximum extent permitted by Jordanian law, GymPass is not liable for injuries, property loss or disputes between the gym and its members beyond what is required by mandatory law.

sections.headline: Changes to these terms
sections.body:
We may amend these terms when product, legal or commercial circumstances require. Material changes will be communicated via the portal at least 14 days before they take effect; continued use of the portal after the effective date is acceptance of the revised terms.

The most recent version always lives at this URL — the Last updated date above is authoritative.

sections.headline: Contact
sections.body: Partner support: partners@gym-pass.net · +962 6 000 0000 · Sun–Thu 9am–6pm Amman time. For urgent operational issues outside hours, use the WhatsApp emergency line provided during onboarding.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How GymPass handles partner and member data

sections.headline: What this policy covers
sections.body:
This policy covers data we collect from the gym partner (you, the operator) and the data we expose to the gym partner about its members. End-member data collection is covered in the member-app privacy policy.

GymPass operates in Jordan and processes data in accordance with applicable Jordanian data-protection requirements.

sections.headline: Partner data we collect
sections.body:
From the gym partner we collect: business name, manager name, contact phone and email, bank account for payouts, gym address and category, opening hours, uploaded logo and photos, and audit trails of changes you make in the portal.

We do not collect personal financial data about partner staff beyond what is required for payouts.

sections.headline: Member data exposed to partners
sections.body:
When a member checks into your gym you can see: a masked first name and last initial (e.g. "Ahmad K."), tier label, and a redacted phone (last four digits visible — e.g. "•• ••• 4567"). Members' full names, full phone numbers, addresses and payment details are never sent to your portal.

This masking is enforced server-side. A partner request that bypasses it would be rejected at the API layer even if a frontend bug attempted to render the unmasked value.

sections.headline: Purpose of processing
sections.body:
Partner data is used to: operate the partner portal, calculate and pay out commissions, verify check-ins against tier rules, contact you about operational issues, and audit changes for safety and integrity.

Member data shown to you is used solely to confirm a check-in just happened. Storing, exporting or contacting members using the masked data shown in your portal is not permitted by these terms.

sections.headline: Retention
sections.body:
Audit-log entries are retained for the duration of the partner agreement plus a regulatory retention period of seven years. Payout ledgers are retained for ten years. Logo and photo uploads remain available until you remove them or the agreement terminates.

We purge or anonymise data sooner if you delete the partner account, except where mandatory retention applies.

sections.headline: Security
sections.body:
All traffic to the partner portal and member app runs over TLS. Passwords are hashed with bcrypt; sessions can be revoked individually from the device list. Mutations are written to an append-only audit log inside the same database transaction as the change itself, so a successful change always has a matching trail.

Per-account login attempts are rate-limited at the IP and phone level to slow credential-stuffing attacks. We never store payment-card data — payments are mocked in the current build and will route through a regulated gateway in production.

sections.headline: Sub-processors
sections.body: GymPass infrastructure is hosted on a Jordanian cloud region operated by a regulated provider. We may use sub-processors for transactional email, SMS OTP delivery and crash reporting. The current list of sub-processors is available from partners@gym-pass.net on request and updated when it changes.

sections.headline: Your rights
sections.body:
Partners may at any time: request a copy of the data we hold about your gym, correct inaccurate records, and request deletion subject to mandatory retention. Requests are honoured within 30 days.

Member privacy rights (access, deletion, correction) are exercised through the member app or member support — partners cannot act on a member's behalf.

sections.headline: Changes
sections.body: We may amend this policy when the underlying data flows change or when regulators publish new guidance. Material changes are notified in the portal and the Last updated date above is updated.

sections.headline: Contact
sections.body: Privacy inquiries: privacy@gym-pass.net. Data subject requests, complaints and breach notifications should be sent to the same address.

qr.title: Gym QR
qr.subtitle: Print this once. Tape it at your entrance. Members scan it from the app to check in.
qr.explainer: The QR encodes a gym-pass.net link to your gym. Members with the app scan it from inside the app to check in; anyone else who scans it with a regular camera is taken to our website. Every check-in is verified server-side — tier, monthly allowance, replay protection — so a duplicate print can't unlock extra visits and a screenshot can't be forwarded.
qr.tipEyeLevel: Eye-level near the door — members shouldn't have to crouch or stretch.
qr.tipLamination: Laminate or sleeve it before mounting. Tape glare blinds the camera.
qr.tipFlatSurface: Flat, matte surface. Curved or glossy mounts cause focus hunting.
qr.tipNoReprint: This QR is permanent. Re-printing the same file gives you an identical, valid copy — no need to ask us to regenerate.
qr.printTagline: Scan to check in with GymPass
